title: AI Solution Architect in Digital Solutions
description:
*Ready to find your path? Try new things. Share experiences. And discover what you truly enjoy.*


Your role


As an AI Solution Architect at Saab, you will sit at the intersection of advanced engineering and strategic business impact. You will be the driving force behind designing, building, and deploying scalable AI systems that address real-world challenges in defence, security, and critical infrastructure. With a background in Applied AI Engineering, you will bring both the technical depth and the architectural vision needed to take AI from proof of concept to production at scale.


This is a hands-on role where your decisions shape the AI infrastructure of tomorrow — and where your work directly contributes to keeping societies safe.


What You'll Do

* Lead the end-to-end delivery of AI solutions — from requirements and system design through to deployment and monitoring in production environments
* Leverage cloud AI services across AWS and/or Microsoft Azure to architect cost-effective and high performing solutions
* Manage and process large-scale data using Spark or Kafka, ensuring robust data engineering practices
* Communicate complex AI architectures and trade-offs clearly to both technical teams and executive stakeholders
* Collaborate cross-functionally in a team setting with data/ML engineers, solution owners, and domain experts to deliver outcomes that matter


Your profile


You are a technically strong and outcome-oriented professional who combines engineering skills with strategic thinking. You thrive in environments where impact is visible and the problems are genuinely hard.


You bring:

* 3–7 years of experience in AI, ML, or software engineering roles, with growing expertise in applied and Generative AI
* Minimum Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field
* Strong Python skills and practical experience building Generative AI applications — RAG pipelines, LLM-powered APIs, and prompt engineering using tools like Hugging Face, LangChain, and vector databases
* Ability to work independently across the full solution lifecycle, from architecture and coding to deployment and iteration
* Clear communicator who can explain AI concepts to non-technical stakeholders and align around outcomes
* Strong project management abilities and a track record of effective stakeholder management
* Outcome-oriented mindset with a focus on delivering measurable business value

*This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.*


What you will be part of


Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.


Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 26,100 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.


Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here.


Why join us? At our company, you will own high-impact solutions that support service members, partners, and critical national infrastructure, making a real difference through your work. You will lead meaningful projects within a modern Digital Solutions organisation that enjoys strong executive sponsorship, providing ample opportunities for growth. We offer a flexible hybrid work model to ensure a healthy work-life balance. Additionally, you will be rewarded with a competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.


How to Apply


Submit your CV along with a brief note highlighting a recent initiative you led, including the business problem you addressed and the outcomes achieved. Describe how you align stakeholders when trade-offs are tough. Additionally, provide an example of how you improved team flow or delivery quality.

*Kindly observe that this is an ongoing recruitment process and that the position might be filled before the closing date of the advertisement.*
company_description: Saab serves the global market with world-leading products, services and solutions from military defense to civil security.

title: Tomelilla Kommun söker IT-tekniker!
description:
Välkommen med din ansökan senast: 2026-03-30  


(länk till annan webbplats)
**Kontaktperson för frågor kring tjänsten**


Mikael Göransson, Digitaliseringschef  

Telefon: 0417-182 26  

E-post: mikael.goransson@tomelilla.se

**Facklig företrädare**

  

Fackliga representanter nås via kommunens växel  

Telefon: 0417-180 00

Vill du bli en del av ett glatt och trevligt team är du varmt välkommen att söka tjänsten!



På Österlen skapar vi förutsättningar för hög livskvalitet där Tomelilla kommun är en plats för inspiration och utveckling. Kommunen har cirka 800 medarbetare och vi erbjuder dig goda utvecklingsmöjligheter, delaktighet genom tillit och möjlighet till balans mellan jobb och fritid.  

  

Vi är just nu på en utvecklingsresa med fokus på att effektivisera och förbättra vår service. Vår ambition är att vara ledande i att ta till vara på de möjligheter som digitaliseringen ger. Kort sagt- vi ska göra det enkelt för alla som bor i, verkar i eller besöker Tomelilla kommun.

**Om arbetsplatsen**
--------------------

  

Digitaliseringsavdelningen är placerad i kommunhuset. Vi arbetar nära varandra och stöttar gemensamt verksamheten, samtidigt som var och en har sitt eget specialistområde. Den aktuella tjänsten är inom Helpdesk, där ni kommer att vara tre personer som tillsammans ansvarar för supporten, med stöd från övriga kollegor. Tjänsten är i huvudsak förlagd på plats, men vid särskilda tillfällen finns möjlighet till distansarbete.  

  

Vill du bli en del av ett glatt och trevligt team är du varmt välkommen att söka tjänsten!

**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------


Dina arbetsuppgifter består till största delen av att hantera, lösa och dokumentera ärende via vår Helpdesk. Du kommer ingå i en grupp som arbetar tätt med dessa ärenden. Du kommer att arbetar mot kommunens alla verksamheter.  

  

Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter består av support av datorer, mobiltelefoner, kringutrustning samt relaterad mjukvara. Du kommer att arbetar med installation, leverans, felsökning och övrig problemlösning. Vi arbetar ständigt med förbättringar och ser gärna att du är en del av denna process.

**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------


För att vara aktuell för tjänsten krävs högskole- eller yrkeshögskoleutbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant för tjänsten, eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig. Om du är utbildad IT-tekniker eller har liknande utbildning är det meriterande.  

  

Om du har tidigare erfarenhet som IT-tekniker eller arbetat med IT-support/helpdesk eller motsvarande är det meriterande.  

  

Vi förutsätter att du har goda kunskaper från Microsoft klientmiljö, främst Windows 11, Microsoft 365, Active Directory men även IOS och Android.  

  

Du behöver kunna hantera många arbetsuppgifter samtidigt och ha lätt för att ge förklaringar till de som kontaktar dig. Du behöver vara självgående och noggrann med din dokumentation av de ärenden som kommer in. Stor social kompetens värderas högt då du kommer att ha mycket kontakt med kommunens medarbetare.  

  

Då kommunikation är en stor del i arbetet behöver du obehindrat kunna uttrycka dig på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.  

  

Då arbetet till viss del sker ute i kommunens verksamheter behöver du ha B-körkort.

**Anställningsvillkor**
-----------------------


Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning  

Omfattning: Heltid  

Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse. Intervjuer sker löpande.

**Ansökan**
-----------


Ansök senast: 2026-03-30  

Referensnummer: C312714  

Ansök här

**Övrigt**
----------


Tomelilla kommun har rökfri arbetstid.  

  

Medarbetare sökes under förutsättning att tjänsten inte måste tas i anspråk av redan anställd personal eller personer med företrädesrätt.  

  

För att kvalitetssäkra rekryteringsprocessen samt möjliggöra god kommunikation med våra sökande ska ansökan skickas in digitalt via Visma Recruit och inte via e-post eller pappersformat. Har du skyddade personuppgifter ska du inte ansöka via Visma Recruit, utan kontakta HR-rekrytering via växeln 0417-18 000.  

  

Inför rekryteringsarbetet har Tomelilla kommun, tagit ställning till önskvärda rekryteringskanaler och marknadsföring. Vi undanber oss därför bestämt kontakt med mediesäljare, rekryteringssajter och liknande.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**Work Schedule**


Standard (Mon-Fri)**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world’s toughest challenges, like protecting the environment, making sure our food is safe or helping find cures for cancer.


Our proteomic sciences (PSX) solutions are transforming the understanding of human diseases through advanced protein biomarker discovery. With our innovative Olink solutions – including highly specific and validated assays that cover more than 5,000 proteins – our colleagues and technology empower scientists in groundbreaking research that will play a pivotal role in the future of personalized medicine.

**The job:**

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Data Engineer with a strong background in AWS to contribute to the buildup of our new global data analytics platform for data scientists. In the role as Data Engineer, you will be responsible for developing the architecture and designing of our planned environment.

**Key responsibilities:**

* Design and implement a robust and scalable environment in AWS using best practices whenever applicable.
* Design, develop, scalable and robust data pipeline architecture for data ingestion, transformation, and integrations.
* Support users-scientist with tooling for analysis
* Implement data solutions to enable real-time and batch data processing, ensuring data quality, accuracy, and consistency across multiple sources.
* Collaborate with user such as data scientists, analysts, and other stakeholders to understand and address data requirements for various analytical and operational needs.
* Work closely and align with ITOps to build a robust and secure data governance model.
* Model, design for optimized data processing performance, ensuring efficient use of resources and adherence to best practices.
* Troubleshoot and resolve data-related issues, providing technical guidance and support to team members and stakeholders during the project.
* Contribute with up-to-date industry standards, trends, and advancements in the data engineering field, applying new techniques and technologies as appropriate.

**Requirements:**

* Minimum of **5** years of experience in data engineering or a similar role.
* Strong hands-on experience with AWS services such as S3, Glue, Lambda, EMR, and Redshift.
* Hands-on experience from architectural design in AWS
* Familiarity with data modelling, data warehousing, and big data technologies.
* Experienced in Data Visualization Tools
* Having experience working in Databricks is meriting

**Why Join Us?**


At PSX, Thermo Fisher Scientific, you will be part of a nurturing team that values integrity, innovation, and involvement. We offer an encouraging environment where your diverse experiences and perspectives are appreciated, enabling you to thrive and excel in your career. Come aboard and contribute significantly to global health and safety!


Apply now!
company_description: At Thermo Fisher Scientific, our professionals develop critical solutions—and build rewarding careers.

title: IT-projektledare
description:
**Om uppdraget**
----------------


Vi söker en IT-projektledare som vill ta nästa steg och driva IT-projekt i en dynamisk och verksamhetsnära miljö. Du kommer att leda projekt genom hela livscykeln – från planering till leverans – med stöd av en erfaren projektorganisation. Rollen ger dig möjlighet att växa in i mer komplexa uppdrag och bredda din kompetens inom både teknik och förändringsledning.

**Börkrav**
-----------

* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av IT-projektledning eller motsvarande koordinerande roll (t.ex. delprojektledare, Scrum Master, teamlead)
* Erfarenhet av att planera, driva och följa upp IT-projekt med flera involverade parter
* God kännedom om agila arbetssätt (Scrum, Kanban) och/eller traditionell projektledning
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med tidplaner, budget och enklare riskhantering
* God teknisk förståelse – du kan föra dialog med utvecklare och tekniska resurser
* Erfarenhet av intressenthantering och kommunikation med både verksamhet och IT
* God svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

**Meriterande**
---------------

* Certifiering inom projektledning (PMP, PRINCE2, PSM eller motsvarande)
* Erfarenhet av verktyg som Jira, Confluence, MS Project eller Azure DevOps
* Erfarenhet av förändringsledning eller verksamhetsnära implementationsprojekt
* Erfarenhet från regulatoriskt styrda branscher (bank, finans, energi, offentlig sektor)
* Kunskap om förvaltningsmodeller som PM3 eller ITIL
* Erfarenhet av att samverka med externa leverantörer

**Vem vi söker**
----------------


Du har kommit förbi juniorstadiet och har några lyckade projektleveranser bakom dig. Nu vill du ta mer ägarskap och driva projekt med större självständighet. Du är strukturerad, kommunikativ och trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik och verksamhet. Vi värdesätter din vilja att utvecklas lika mycket som din befintliga erfarenhet.

title: Data Engineer
description:
Are you passionate about transforming data into scalable, secure, and intelligent solutions? We are hiring Data Engineers to join exciting projects at the forefront of analytics and innovation in the automotive and mobility sectors.

**What You’ll Do:**

* Design, build, and maintain scalable batch and streaming data pipelines.
* Engineer robust ETL workflows and medallion architecture-based data lakehouses.
* Develop and deploy data solutions using Python, PySpark, SQL, Airflow, and Databricks.
* Use and manage tools across Azure, AWS, Docker, and Linux environments.
* Operate with CI/CD principles using Git, DevOps, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
* Ensure data quality, security, and system performance via monitoring and validation.
* Work on advanced BI dashboards in Power BI.

**What we are looking for:**

* 7+ years of data engineering experience for senior roles.
* Strong coding background in Python, SQL, and Shell scripting.
* Proficiency with cloud services like Azure Data Factory, AWS (Redshift, EMR, S3).
* Experience in data modeling and business intelligence.
* Comfortable with DevOps workflows and data platform operations.
* Strong communication skills and team-first mindset.
* Fluent in English

 **Nice to Have:**

* Experience with Power BI dashboards and BI project leadership.
* Familiarity with automotive data systems.
* Hands-on experience with regression, security, and system upgrade testing.

**Why Work With Us?**


You'll contribute to future-facing initiatives in autonomous driving, electric mobility, and global BI solutions. Whether it's within a startup environment or a powerhouse like the big automotive companies in Gothenburg , your work will directly impact the vehicles and technologies of tomorrow.  

  

Ready to make a data-driven difference? Apply now and power the future with us.

title: Software Engineer - Engineering Productivity / AI
description:
#### **Make every engineer more powerful with AI**

**AI is changing how software gets built. At Nordnet, engineers are already working with AI agents daily — and the bottlenecks are shifting. Code gets written faster, but reviews pile up. Workflows accelerate, but orchestration lags behind.**

**The Agents team exists to solve this. We're a platform team responsible for scaling AI adoption and AI productivity across Nordnet by building agentic workflows and orchestration into the software development lifecycle. Right now, we're building an automated agentic code review process — our first step toward removing the review bottleneck that emerged as engineers started working more agentically.**

**We're looking for engineers who want to work at the intersection of developer tooling and AI. If you're excited about designing systems that make hundreds of engineers measurably more productive, this is the role.**

#### **What you will do**


In this role, you'll work across the engineering organisation to:

* Design and build agentic workflows that automate and accelerate parts of the SDLC
* Develop the tooling and orchestration layer for AI-assisted code review, testing, and delivery
* Identify bottlenecks in developer workflows and build AI-powered solutions to remove them
* Maintain and evolve our internal developer portal and shared tooling
* Create data-driven insights that help teams understand and improve their engineering practices
* Collaborate closely with product and platform teams to drive adoption of new tools and workflows


This is hands-on engineering work with high organizational impact. You'll ship things that change how the entire company builds software.

#### **What we're looking for**

**You are an engineer with a strong software development background who:**

* Has built production systems and understands what makes them reliable
* Is curious about AI, LLMs, and agentic patterns — and wants to apply them to real problems
* Cares about developer experience and thinks in terms of reducing friction at scale
* Communicates clearly and enjoys working across teams to find pragmatic solutions
* Is comfortable navigating ambiguity — this is a fast-moving space and we're charting new territory


We don't expect you to tick every box. If your experience is adjacent and you're excited about building AI-powered developer tooling, we encourage you to apply.

#### **We value engineers who**

* Are pragmatic and collaborative
* Are comfortable giving and receiving feedback
* Care about simplicity and measurable outcomes over complexity
* Enjoy working closely with their internal customers
* Take a scientific approach — experiment, measure, iterate

#### **Experience that will help you succeed**

* TypeScript, Java, or Golang
* Cloud platforms (GCP preferred) and infrastructure as code (Terraform)
* CI/CD pipelines and developer tooling
* Working with LLMs, AI APIs, or building agentic systems
* Data analysis and visualisation (BigQuery, VertexAI, or similar)
* Containerisation and orchestration (Kubernetes)

#### **We offer**

* A collaborative environment where learning is continuous
* Meaningful technical challenges to tackle together with experienced colleagues
* A front-row seat to how AI is reshaping software engineering — and the chance to drive it
* Opportunities to grow as an engineer and/or leader
* Competitive salary and compensation

#### **Who we are**


Nordnet started from a passionate belief that changing the hierarchical financial world was possible. We became part of redefining the industry when we gave the customers power over their own savings. You will become part of a journey that has only yet started towards the vision of making our customers the best investors they can be. To be leading in IT is pivotal for that journey and you will work with colleagues who have a great passion for that goal.


We are 800 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki and Copenhagen. We cooperate, exchange ideas and use our core competencies in order to continuously improve the way we meet our customers. Open communication, creativity and engagement are important parts of our everyday life at the office.


Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We're proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.


Visit us on www.nordnetab.com, www.nordnet.se, www.nordnet.no, www.nordnet.dk and www.nordnet.fi.

#### **Application**


Please apply today – we'll start interviewing immediately. Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.


If you have questions, please contact Senior Talent Acquisition Partner Sophie Esphagen at sophie.esphagen@nordnet.se . We want to inform you that Nordnet conduct credit and background checks on the final candidate. We are looking forward to your application!

title: CoE Solution Architect Manager
description:
**Description**


**The opportunity**
-------------------


At Hitachi Energy our purpose is advancing a sustainable energy future for all. We bring power to our homes, schools, hospitals and factories. Join us and work with fantastic people, while learning and developing yourself on projects that have a real impact to our communities and society. Bring your passion, bring your energy, and be part of a global team that appreciates a simple truth: Diversity + Collaboration = Great Innovation.  

  

We are doing something unique in the power industry – our technology enables greater amounts of power to reach customers with minimal environmental impact. As pioneers and market leaders in the field, we deliver groundbreaking technology to customers all over the world!  

  

Are you a driven team player with the ambition to further develop through new challenges? If so, this can be the right opportunity for you. Take the opportunity to become our Manager for Project Solution Architect and be part of a strong team of professionals at Grid Automation Systems.


“As Manager for Project Solution Architect, you will guide a highly skilled team shaping the technical solutions that define our global success.” – Hiring Manager

**How you’ll make an impact**
-----------------------------

* You will be responsible for the team that designs the overall technical solution and architecture in our commercial system tendering solutions, including HW, Software, 3rd Party applications and Cyber Security.
* Lead and inspire the team to achieve the best possible technical results and solution quality.
* Identify and analyze business needs, gather requirements, and define scope and objectives for the full system, collaborating with domain experts to create standardized solution approaches.
* Meet customers globally to discuss and agree on system design, both as a Manager and as a technical architect.
* Develop and implement new products, processes, standards or operational plans that influence functional results.
* Communicate effectively with leadership and other key stakeholders.
* Ensure a strong understanding of project planning and technical activities.
* Act as an open-minded team player who inspires the team to achieve top-level results.

**Your background**
-------------------

* You hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering.
* You are committed, driven and motivated for continuous improvement.
* You see yourself as a dedicated team player.
* Strong communication skills are part of your strengths.
* Proficiency in English, both spoken and written.

**What we offer**
-----------------

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working hours
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy in Sweden and globally
* Mentor support during onboarding
* Training and education supporting employee development
* Diverse company with 70+ nationalities working in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

**More about us**
-----------------


Are you ready for a new exciting challenge? Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today!


Please note that we are hiring for multiple positions. This role might be subject to a background check.


Recruiting Manager Reza Liaghat, reza.liaghat@hitachienergy.com will answer your questions about the position. title: Junior IT-supporttekniker
description:
Bakgrunden till uppdraget är att vår kunds IT-support behöver förstärkas med nya medarbetare som ersätter befintliga konsulter som avslutar sina uppdrag. Rollen som IT-supporttekniker innebär främst att hantera beställningar, lösa incidenter samt besvara användarfrågor via ärendehanteringssystem, telefon och helpdesk. I rollen ingår även installation och felsökning av både hårdvara och mjukvara.

**Arbetsuppgifter**

* Hantera inkommande ärenden i ärendehanteringssystemet
* Säkerställa korrekt information, klassificering och prioritering av ärenden
* Hantera och lösa incidenter enligt gällande SLA/OLA
* Installera och felsöka både hårdvara och mjukvara
* Fungera som dispatcher och vidareförmedla ärenden till rätt handläggargrupp
* Hantera utskick av beställda programvaror
* Lägga till eller ta bort olika typer av behörigheter
* Administrera användarkonton
* Dokumentera lösningar och rutiner för kända fel i kunskapsdatabasen
* Ge stöd vid interna och externa livesändningar

**Skallkrav**

* Konsulten ska ha en IT-relaterad utbildning, exempelvis gymnasieutbildning eller yrkeshögskoleutbildning inom IT.
* Minst ett års arbetslivserfarenhet som IT-supporttekniker.
* Erfarenhet av behörighetshantering i Active Directory.
* Erfarenhet av installation och felsökning av klienthårdvara.
* Erfarenhet av operativsystemet Windows 11 samt grundläggande nätverk i rollen som IT-supporttekniker.
* Erfarenhet av att hantera beställningar och incidenter i ServiceNow eller liknande ärendehanteringssystem.
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift.

**Meriterande**

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med beställningar och incidenthantering i ServiceNow.
* Erfarenhet av att sända bild eller ljud via internet, exempelvis genom streaming eller livesändningar.

 **Tillträde och ansökan:**

**Startdatum**: 2026-05-04

**Slutdatum**: 2028-05-04. Möjlighet till 1 + 1 år, dvs. längst t.o.m. 2030-05-04.

**Sista ansökningsdagen**: 2026-03-20

**Omfattning**: Uppdraget beräknas motsvara en heltidstjänst (100 %).  

**Placeringsort**: Uppdraget utförs på kundens kontor i Sundbyberg. Distansarbete är inte aktuellt. Resor till andra av kundens kontor i Sverige kan förekomma.  

**Säkerhetsprövning**: Uppdraget kräver genomförd säkerhetsprövning samt registerkontroll.


Urval och intervjuer sker löpande!


Sway Sourcing är en innovativ rekryteringspartner som specialiserar sig på att matcha rätt talang med rätt företag – snabbt och effektivt. Vårt huvudfokus ligger inom Ekonomi, Administration, HR, Marknad och IT, men vi har även den breda expertis och flexibilitet som krävs för att leverera skräddarsydda rekryteringslösningar inom alla branscher.


Trots att vi är en relativt ny aktör har vi redan byggt förtroende hos många av Sveriges största företag och arbetar både nationellt och internationellt. Med baser i Sverige och Spanien erbjuder vi en unik kombination av lokal expertis och global räckvidd. Vårt starka nätverk och djupa branschinsikter gör oss till en självklar partner för företag som vill ligga steget före i sin rekrytering.

title: IT-projektledare (deltid)
description:
### **OM JOBBET**


Du kommer att sitta som projektledare i en leveransavdelning och koordinera/följa upp pågående leveranser av hård-, mjukvara, licenser och resurser.

### **ARBETSUPPGIFTER**

* Följa upp pågående leveranser
* Koordinera mellan interna ansvariga, konsulter, kund och leverantörer
* Rapportera status till intressenter
* Flagga för avvikelser
* Jobbet är på deltid (ca 100 h i månaden)

### **ERFARENHETER OCH EGENSKAPER**

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet som koordinator eller IT-projektledare
* Office-paketet, Jira
* Sinne för ordning och reda
* Bra förståelse för HW/SW inom IT-leveranser

### **ÖVRIGT**

### **TID FÖR ANSÖKAN**


Låter detta som något för dig? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi intervjuar löpande!

### **OM D-SOURCE**

*Your source to IT*  

D-Source är ett modernt konsultbolag med bredden mellan helpdesk, infrastruktur och Tech. Vi har lång erfarenhet av att förstå kunders IT-behov! Tveka inte att höra av dig om du är intresserad av att ta reda på mer.


Vad kan vi göra för dig och vad kan vi göra tillsammans?

### **INGET JOBB FÖR DIG?**


Lugnt! Du kan alltid registrera dig förutsättningslöst på D-Source jobbsida genom att Connecta med oss. Då hamnar du i vår kandidatdatabas och får koll på våra kommande aktuella tjänster.

title: Junior IT-supporttekniker
description:

**Bakgrund**


Rollen som IT-supporttekniker innebär primärt att hantera beställningar, lösa incidenter och svara på frågor, både via vårt ärendehanteringssystem, telefon och helpdesk. I rollen ingår installation och felsökning av både hård - och mjukvara.

* Hantera inkommande ärenden i vårt ärendehanteringssystem
* Säkerställa information och klassning, prioritet etc
* Lösa incidenter enligt SLA /OLA
* Installation och felsökning av både hård- och mjukvara
* Agera dispatcher och skicka ärenden till rätt handläggargrupp
* Utskick av beställda programvaror
* Lägga till/ta bort olika typer ut av behörigheter
* Administrera användarkonton

description:

title: Data Engineer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

**Essential requirements:**  

* 4+ year’s work experience as Data engineer on Google Cloud Platform
* GCP tools – Dataflow and Bigquery
* Data Build Tool (DBT)
* Experience in different data formats (Avro, Parquet)
* Python
* Java
* Scala
* Good understanding of different data modelling techniques and trade-off Knowledge of NoSQL and RDBMS databases
* Experience in working with data visualization tools
* Business understanding of retail industry

 **Last day to apply**: 24-03-2026

**About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*
