 .
* Join a collaborative, innovative, and fast-paced environment.

title: Data Manager Global Manufacturing & Supply
description:
**Company Description**
***Statistics show that women and underrepresented groups tend to apply to jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Sobi encourages you to change that statistic and apply. Rarely do candidates meet 100% of the qualifications. We look forward to your application!***
 At Sobi, the work we do every day redefines the standards of care and transform the lives of people living with rare diseases.
   

  

 As a diverse team of entrepreneurial people, we are passionate about our growth journey towards becoming a global leader, making a difference for rare disease patients, moving quickly and always challenging the status quo.
   

  

 We are committed to an inclusive, sustainable and flexible workplace that fosters growth and development.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Data Manager within Global Manufacturing and Supply (GMS) you will be the key person to build and manage the processes, governance and system landscape for our data. In other words, you shape the vision of our future data management set up and will be the driver of the data journey within GMS.
   

  

 In our view, good data needs to enable correct and on time supplies to patients and create positive business impact. You will be accountable that all key data of respective systems (e.g. ERP, APS) are created timely, are correct, maintained, synchronized among systems, and communicated to internal and external stakeholders at a high standard and that data quality is reported regularly to stakeholders.
   

  

 You will also partner with functions outside GMS and participate in projects that aim to enhance Sobi’s data management environment.
   

  

 This position is based at our Global Headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden or Global hub in Basel, Switzerland, reporting directly to Head Global Manufacturing & Supply Excellence.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Define, implement, and further develop cross-functional processes and RACI (incl. governance) to create and update Master Data.
* Manage the identification, collection, consolidation and cleansing of master data from various sources.
* Create and update data points and ensure that data sharing among systems works uninterrupted.
* Ensure accurate and timely communication of master data to e.g. 3PL partners and/or Sobi affiliates.
* Define and map source system and user systems of each data point.
* Develop and coordinate / implement data integration strategies to ensure data consistency across systems.
* Collaborate well with various stakeholders within and outside GMS to define and implement ways of working.
* Develop and implement concepts to regularly report data quality, data sharing, and next improvement steps.
* Proactively initiate and potentially lead improvements on processes, systems and roles & responsibilities to enhance data management within GMS, TechOps and Sobi. E.g. Collaborate with IT and software teams to design and implement data solutions including data models, data structures and data interfaces.
* Visualize data points, working processes and systems to business impact (Sobi-TechOps-GMS strategy/value creation plan) and explain / train stakeholders on a) the importance of accurate and timely data management and b) how to collaborate in an efficient and effective way to forester a data-driven culture.
* Be accountable for data related chang controls, respective SOP updates and training / guiding documentation as applicable and set an efficient governance for updating documentation.
* Define a framework for self-inspection on data accuracy to ensure continuous data quality improvement.


**Qualifications**
**About you**
 You are a collaborative, patient-focused professional who thrives in a global, multicultural environment. You enjoy connecting the dots between functions, translating complexity of data into clear direction, and building alignment among diverse stakeholders. You model Sobi’s values through your positive mindset, flexibility, and willingness to go the extra mile to support our mission.
   

  

 Your experience in similar roles allows you to navigate complexity with confidence and deliver results that help ensure continued access to treatments for rare disease communities.
   

  

**Key Qualifications**
* 5 – 10 years of experience in data management, Information Technology, and supply chain functions.
* Minimum 5 years’ GMP/GDP experience in the pharmaceutical or biotech industry.
* Experience working effectively in intercultural and highly matrixed environments.
* Proven ability to build, influence and embed data strategies / process re-designs across cross-functional and remote teams.
* University degree in Data Analytics, Computer science, Information systems, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
* Strong presentation and communication skills.
* Excellent written and verbal English.
* Strong proficiency in MS Office, ERP systems, Advanced Planning Systems (APS) and Data Management Tools.


**Nice to Have**
* Experience in Data analytics and system implementation
* Project management qualification
* Lean Six Sigma qualification / experience
* Knowledge on IFS and Kinaxis Maestro
* AI experience
* Additional langue skills such as Swedish or German


 Here at Sobi we live by our core values: Care, Ambition, Urgency, Ownership and Partnership!
   

  

**Additional Information**
**How to apply**
 We have an ongoing selection process in this recruitment and ask you to send your application as soon as possible. Click apply and include your resume in English.
   

  

**Why Join Us?**
 Here At Sobi, Our Mission And Culture Get Us Excited To Come To Work Every Day, But Here Are a Few More Reasons To Join Our Team
   

  

* Emphasis on work/life balance
* Collaborative and team-oriented environment
* Opportunities for professional growth
* Diversity and Inclusion
* Competitive compensation for your work
* Making a positive impact to help ultra-rare disease patients who are in need of life saving treatments


 We are a global company with over 1,900 employees in more than 30 countries and are committed to the societies where we operate. With a deeply skilled management team directing our day-to-day wins, and a Board with a stellar track record, we’re ready to take on the world’s diseases, ailments and adversity. Our people believe they have the power to make a positive impact in others’ lives because that’s exactly what we do here. If you’re seeking a career that taps into your talents in a way that makes the world a better, healthier place, we just may have a job for you.
   

  

 We know our employees are our most valuable asset, and our culture conveys that. We offer a competitive benefits package, to support the health and happiness of our staff.
   

  

**Sobi Culture**
 At Sobi, we refuse to accept the status quo. This is because we have witnessed first-hand the challenges facing those affected by rare diseases and have used this knowledge to shape our business to find new ways of helping them.
   

  

 As a specialized biopharmaceutical company, we are dedicated to rare diseases. And we see this focus as a strength. By effectively turning our research into ground-breaking treatments, we help make medicine more accessible and open up more possibilities for patients and more opportunities for those caring for them. This has been our approach since day one, but we know we can’t change the world of rare diseases on our own. Accomplishing this requires strong partnerships with patients, partners and stakeholders across the entire value chain. Together, we define how our business can create solutions that serve the needs of those affected by rare diseases while facilitating sustainable growth.

title: Batchplanerare
description:
**Att jobba som batchplanerare**
 Som batchplanerare är du en central del av Skandias mainframeleverans. Tillsammans med teamet säkerställer du att våra affärskritiska batchflöden fungerar varje dag – över 1000 planerade jobb som bland annat hanterar premier och utbetalningar.
   

  

 Rollen kombinerar tekniskt djup med operativt ansvar. Du arbetar med batchplanering, JCL och behörighetsadministration i RACF och är med och säkrar stabil drift i en komplex stordatamiljö.
   

  

 Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med utvecklingsteam och driftpartner, i en miljö där struktur, noggrannhet och leveranssäkerhet är avgörande. Samtidigt är teamet involverat i större utvecklingsinitiativ som ställer höga krav på planering och genomförande.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* Erfarenhet av batchplanering eller batchhantering i komplex mainframe-miljö
* God teknisk kompetens inom z/OS
* Grundläggande kunskaper i JCL
* Erfarenhet av batchverktyg såsom OPC (Workload Scheduler for z/OS), Control-M, Jobtrac eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet av driftarbete och incidenthantering
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift samt god engelska


 Som person är du strukturerad och metodisk med ett starkt kvalitetstänk. Du tar ansvar för stabil leverans i affärskritiska flöden och arbetar analytiskt vid incidenter och felsökning.
   

  

 Du är trygg i samarbetet med både interna team och externa leverantörer och förstår vikten av noggrannhet i en komplex driftmiljö. Du har bra samarbete med dina arbetskollegor och delar gärna med dig av dina kompetenser.
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Lärare inom OT-säkerhet
description:
****Lärare inom OT-säkerhet (Operational Technology Security)****
**Arbetsgivare:** 
 TeknikAkademin Norden AB
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid / deltid
   

  

**Plats:** 
 På plats och distans över hela landet. Sök oavsett var du bor.
   

  

**Tillträde:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

****Om rollen****
 TeknikAkademin Norden AB söker en lärare inom
 **OT-säkerhet (Operational Technology Security)** 
 som vill undervisa studerande i hur industriella system och kritisk infrastruktur skyddas mot cyberhot.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att introducera studerande till säkerhetsarbete i industriella miljöer där IT och OT möts, exempelvis inom produktion, energi och samhällskritiska system. Undervisningen kombinerar teori och praktiska moment där studerande får förstå hur industriella styrsystem fungerar och hur de kan skyddas mot intrång och cyberattacker.
   

  

****Dina arbetsuppgifter****
* Undervisa i grundläggande och avancerad OT-säkerhet
* Introducera industriella styrsystem såsom SCADA, PLC och ICS
* Undervisa i säkerhetsarkitektur för industriella nätverk
* Introducera riskanalys och säkerhetsarbete i OT-miljöer
* Handleda studerande i praktiska övningar inom OT-säkerhet
* Förklara hur IT- och OT-miljöer integreras och skyddas


****Vi söker dig som****
* Har minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet inom OT-säkerhet, industriell IT eller cybersäkerhet
* Har erfarenhet av SCADA, PLC, ICS eller industriella nätverk
* Har god förståelse för cybersäkerhet i industriella miljöer
* Har erfarenhet av riskhantering och säkerhetsarbete i kritisk infrastruktur
* Har god pedagogisk förmåga och kan förklara tekniska koncept tydligt
* Har goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift
* Meriterande: erfarenhet av undervisning eller relevanta säkerhetscertifieringar


****Vi erbjuder****
* Hög ersättning
* Möjlighet till hybridarbete (distans och platsundervisning)
* En meningsfull roll där du gör verklig skillnad
* En trygg roll i ett växande och framtidsinriktat utbildningsföretag


****Kontakt****
**malcolm.mustafa@teknikakademin.se**

title: Operations Intern
description:
**Filed is building the first AI tax preparer trusted by America’s accounting firms.**
 This industry might seem boring—but it’s a $70B backbone of the economy that’s breaking under a talent shortage no one has solved. We’re fixing it—fast.
   

  

 In just 9 months, we’ve hit strong product-market fit, are generating insanely fast-growing, ridiculously sticky revenue, and are backed by top-tier investors. We’re not a tool—we’re the missing workforce firms have been sounding the alarm for. We’re building the future by expanding our already 30-person team with those who want to say “I was there when it all started.”
   

  

 Read more → TechCrunch
   

  

 ⸻
   

  

**What we should tell you about the role:**
 We’re looking for a
 **Business Operations Intern** 
 who thrives on building order from chaos and loves improving the way a company operates. You’re the kind of person who spots inefficiencies, designs systems to eliminate them, and has the drive to implement solutions quickly. You know that a great internal process is invisible to most people—but game-changing for the team that depends on it.
   

  

 This is a
 **part-time role designed to fit alongside your studies** 
 —you set the number of hours you work each week, as long as you deliver on the outcomes.
   

  

 Your mission:
 ***Significantly improve our internal processes through automation and structure, speeding up reporting, ensuring we’re not missing anything, and delivering on our deadlines.***
 You’ll work closely with leadership, operations, and other departments to streamline workflows, unify data sources, and ensure that we’re moving at the speed our growth demands. You won’t just make systems more efficient—you’ll create leverage that compounds over time.
   

  

 ⸻
   

  

**Here’s why this is a terrible job:**
* This is not a job for someone who likes to move slow.
* We operate week to week with ruthless speed. Sometimes we’re going in the wrong direction, but more times than not we’re going in the right direction.
* If you need a few extra days to perfect a process document, chances are there’s already a handful of team members blocked behind you.
* We implement tools and automations fast—often testing in real time.
* You’ll be operating at the intersection of operations, reporting, and cross-team coordination.
* There are no clear answers. Just judgment calls, ambiguity, and constant input from every direction.
* You’ll ask yourself, is this really the work? It is. And it’s not for everyone.


 ⸻
   

  

**Here’s why it’s the best career choice you’ll make:**
* We’re building what tax pros call impossible. A product that behaves like a teammate, not just another tool.
* You’ll be paid above market for an internship, gain experience at a rocket-ship startup, and have full autonomy to make high-impact improvements.
* You’ll own systems end-to-end, from design to deployment.
* You’ll work with leadership daily and see the direct impact of your contributions on company-wide performance.
* We’ll tell you what needs to be achieved. How you get there is on you.
* You’ll be building a foundation that allows the company to scale without breaking.


 ⸻
   

  

**The teammate we’re looking for:**
* Thrives at solving operational inefficiencies and systems challenges
* Moves seamlessly between identifying problems, implementing solutions, and iterating quickly
* Excited by the challenge of making internal operations invisible (because they just work)
* No lone wolves — we need a collaborative operator
* Big bonus if you have experience implementing automation or AI agents in a work environment


 ⸻
   

  

**What you’ll be responsible for:**
* Assist leadership in establishing a single source of truth for our business and financial metrics that updates automatically with minimal manual intervention.
* Implement operational automations that save significant time while for operations.
* Support management with various ad-hoc tasks that substantially reduce workload across the company, freeing up time for management to focus on key tasks.


 ⸻
   

  

**Your hard skillset:**
* Currently enrolled at a prestigious university preferably with strong academic performance.
* Previous experience internships, or working in a small, fast-paced, and dynamic environment.
* Proficient in workplace tools, integrations, and automations—especially AI applications or AI agents—with demonstrated hands-on experience.
* Strong professional references.


 ⸻
   

  

**Your soft skillset:**
* Comfortable being uncomfortable and making calls with incomplete data
* Empathetic and curious — building for the team, not just for performance metrics
* Highly collaborative across departments and with leadership
* Detail-oriented but pragmatic — you know when polish matters and when to move
* You own your work and welcome the accountability that comes with it


 ⸻
   

  

**Growth and Levels:**
* This isn’t a comfy operations internship. It’s fast, focused, and impact-obsessed.
* You will launch improvements fast. You will learn fast. You will own what you ship.
* Opportunity to transition into a full-time role based on performance.


 ⸻
   

  

**The process:**
* Quick intro call (30 minutes)
* Practical case study (60 minutes)
* Final round with our team (60 minutes)


 In just 2.5 hours, you’ll be wanting early access—just like the rest of our team—to get into the stack and start building a generational company, even before your first day. Because you’ll see the opportunity to change your career trajectory—fast.

title: Solutions architect - Environmental Solutions team
description:
We are supporting
 **our client within the Construction industry** 
 in finding an experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 for a 6‑month assignment, with a high possibility of extension. The role is primarily based at their Stockholm office, with the option to work from Stockholm or Gothenburg. Occasional travel within Scandinavia should be expected.
   

  

**Start: 2026-03-30**
**End: 2026-09-30**
**Location: Stockholm or Gothenburgh**
**About The Assignment**
 You will join the client’s data‑driven Environmental Solutions team, a central function supporting sustainability, climate calculations, compliance, and ESRS reporting. The mission is to design scalable solutions for collecting, structuring, and ensuring the quality of environmental data.
   

  

 The role involves translating business needs into robust architectural designs and coordinating work across product teams, data engineers, integration specialists, and external partners. You will also act as an expert advisor on environmental data across the organisation.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Deliver solution architecture documentation including process, application, information, and infrastructure viewpoints.
* Lead solution design within cross‑functional project teams and secure alignment with business and IT stakeholders.
* Apply MVP‑based design principles to support iterative delivery.
* Adhere to the client's architectural frameworks (integration, security, master data).
* Participate in architecture forums and contribute to the development of architectural practices.
* Provide guidance on environmental data and its organisational value.


**Required Competence & Experience**
* Several years of experience in solution design within large or complex IT environments.
* Strong ability to analyse and map information flows and system interactions.
* Deep knowledge of data science principles and information modelling.
* Proven experience with ArchiMate modelling in Sparx Enterprise Architect.
* Documented experience in information security, including protection needs assessment and ISO 27000 controls.
* Strong collaboration skills and the ability to translate business needs into clear architectural solutions.
* Fluency in Swedish and English (spoken and written).


**Meritorious**
* Experience from the construction industry.
* Background in software development (highly beneficial).
* Experience facilitating workshops and supporting decision‑making.
* Understanding of IT governance and architectural principles.
* Experience with cloud solutions and modern integration platforms (especially Azure).
* Experience delivering solution architecture from design to implemented solution.

title: Infrastructure Solution Architect
description:
**Vattenfall IT söker nu en Infrastructure Solution Architect som vill följa med på vår resa mot fossilfrihet!**
 Som Infrastructure Solution Architect har du en taktisk roll där du översätter verksamhetsmässiga och tekniska krav till genomförbar teknisk lösningsarkitektur och lösningsdesign. Du bidrar både till projektleveranser och till standardiserade förmågor inom lösningstekniska leveransområden, samtidigt som du säkerställer att lösningarna är i linje med arkitekturen på domännivå.
   

  

 Dina ansvarsområden omfattar bla att ta fram heltäckande E2E lösningsarkitektur och lösningsdesign samt att följa upp och stötta dess implementation. Genom att arbeta enligt Vattenfall IT:s ISMS och IT‑arkitekturprinciper säkerställer du att lösningarna följer våra strategier, tekniska standarder samt regulatoriska och säkerhetsmässiga riktlinjer och krav.
   

  

 Samarbete och kommunikation är centralt i rollen och innebär dialog med intressenter på alla nivåer. Oavsett om det handlar om att leda övergripande diskussioner kring verksamhetskrav eller att fördjupa sig i tekniska detaljer, är din roll att säkerställa samsyn mellan projektspecifika lösningar och strategier på domänarkitektnivå.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter och ansvarsområden**
* Översätta verksamhets- och funktionskrav till tekniska lösningar genom att använda befintliga IT‑tjänster för att undvika onödig nyutveckling.
* Utveckla säker, skalbar och kostnadseffektiv lösningsarkitektur i linje med system‑, verksamhets‑ och säkerhetskrav.
* Utveckla lösningar i enlighet med koncernövergripande principer, domänstrategier och säkerhetsriktlinjer (t.ex. ISMS, zonindelning och skikt‑modeller).
* Driva konsolidering, förenkling och standardisering genom återanvändning av befintliga mönster, ritningar och byggblock samt i samarbete med Infrastrukturdomänarkitekter hantera eventuella gap.
* Följa upp implementation och ge teknisk vägledning under projektens genomförande.


 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Du har ett genuint intresse för vår energi- och distributionsverksamhet för att tillsammans med denna bidra till utvecklingen av elektrifieringen i Sverige och Europa. Du är proaktiv, drivande och tar egna initiativ för att skapa framdrift. Du trivs i dynamiska, internationella miljöer och i samarbete med olika kulturer. Som en stark kommunikatör och samarbetsinriktad problemlösare samverkar du effektivt både med tekniska team, kollegor i affärsverksamheten för att säkerställa samsyn och arkitektonisk konsekvens.
   

  

 Du kommunicerar med olika intressenter, är en lagspelare som värdesätter kunskapsdelning och trivs i en föränderlig arbetsmiljö. Du har lätt för att sätta dig in i komplexa situationer och verksamhetskrav, analysera problem och arbeta strukturerat för att ta fram de bästa IT‑lösningarna.
   

  

**Vi Ser Gärna Att Du Har**
* Examen inom IT, datavetenskap eller annat relevant område
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet och tekniskt kompetens inom Infrastrukturarkitektur
* Stark projektbakgrund och god förståelse för såväl Vattenfallsmodellen som agilt arbetssätt.
* God förståelse för IT‑säkerhet och tillämpning av branschstandarder
* Grundläggande kunskap och erfarenhet av Arkitektur i Azure Cloud
* God förmåga att ta fram både lösningsarkitektur och detaljerade lösningsdesigner för IT‑infrastruktur.
* Förståelse för ITIL‑ och ITSM‑processer
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift
* Erfarenhet av VMware är meriterande


 Ytterligare information
   

  

*Förutom att du får vara med och forma framtidens smarta energisamhälle erbjuder vi dig ett utvecklande och omväxlande arbete med många kontaktytor. För oss på Vattenfall är det viktigt att arbete och privatliv har en god balans, därför erbjuder vi flexibilitet i arbetet samt möjlighet till att arbeta hemifrån vid behov. Vi har även en hel del andra personalförmåner som exempelvis arbetstidsförkortning, förmånliga tjänstepensionsavtal, föräldraledighetstillägg med mera. Läs mer om våra förmåner här.*
**Placeringsort**
 Forsmark, Ringhals, Solna
   

  

**För mer information** 
 om själva tjänsten kontakta rekryterande chef Kerstin Eurenius, kerstin.eurenius@vattenfall.com. För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta rekryterare Julia Norberg, julia.norberg@vattenfall.com.
   

  

 Fackliga representanter via Vattenfalls växel, 08 739 50 00. Sofi Wadström (Akademikerna), Patricia Ek (Unionen), Christer Gustafsson (Ledarna), Juha Siipilehto (SEKO).
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-03-31.** 
 Urval och intervjuer sker löpande. Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via vår webbplats. Vi tar inte emot personligt brev i ansökan. Du söker snabbt och enkelt genom att svara på urvalsfrågor och bifoga ditt CV.
   

  

 På Vattenfall värdesätter vi att vara aktiva, positiva, öppna och säkerhetsmedvetna. Vi söker medarbetare som delar vår vision och kan bidra till att stärka vår företagskultur. Vi är övertygade om att mångfald bidrar till att bygga ett mer lönsamt och tilltalande företag och strävar efter att vara goda förebilder när det gäller mångfald. Vattenfall arbetar aktivt för att alla medarbetare ska ha samma möjligheter och rättigheter oavsett ålder, etnisk eller kulturell bakgrund, könstillhörighet, religion/tro, sexuell läggning eller funktionsvariation. Läs mer om hur vi arbetar med mångfald och inkludering här.
   

  

 Då säkerheten för Vattenfall och dess anställda är avgörande kommer vi innan varje anställning genomföra en ”pre-employment screening”. Dessa kontroller baseras på din roll som du kommer att fylla inom Vattenfall.
   

  

*Att arbeta inom Vattenfall innebär att arbeta med samhällsviktig infrastruktur. Därmed är många av våra tjänster säkerhetsklassade och du kan komma att bli krigsplacerad. Är denna tjänst säkerhetsklassad kommer säkerhetsprövning genomföras innan anställning, i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen. En eventuell krigsplacering sker med stöd i anställningsavtalet och lagen om totalförsvarsplikt.*
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Företagsbeskrivning
   

  

 Vattenfall är en av Europas största producenter och återförsäljare av el och värme. Våra huvudmarknader är Sverige, Tyskland, Nederländerna, Danmark och Storbritannien. Inom Vattenfallkoncernen finns cirka 21 000 anställda. Vi har elektrifierat industrier, levererat energi till bostäder och förvandlat tillvaron genom innovation i över hundra års tid.

title: Junior Project Manager - Charging Infrastructure
description:
Are you passionate about making a sustainable impact in the world of electric transport? Do you thrive in an innovative and entrepreneurial environment? Then you might be the new Junior Project Manager at Erinion!
   

  

**About Erinion**
 Erinion designs, builds and operates depot and destination charging solutions for heavy-duty vehicles. As part of the Scania Group, we combine the strength of a global transport leader with the agility of a fast-growing company. Our approach focuses on energy efficiency and optimal utilisation, ensuring that electrification is not only sustainable but also financially and commercially viable for our customers. We support different ways of financing, owning and operating charging sites, so that each customer can find the model that best fits their business. With operations across eight European markets and global expansion underway, we enable transport operators to electrify their fleets with confidence and long-term profitability.
   

  

 Your Role
   

  

 As a Junior Project Manager – Charging Infrastructure, you will support our Project Managers in delivering charging infrastructure projects across our markets.
   

  

 You will help ensure that projects progress smoothly by maintaining data in Sitetracker, coordinating documentation, and supporting the preparation of site layouts and technical drawings. You will also work with digital tools used to simulate vehicle movements and charging site layouts for heavy-duty vehicles.
   

  

 This role offers a strong learning opportunity for someone interested in infrastructure project delivery and electrification. Over time, you will gain a deeper understanding of the deployment process and may take on increasing responsibility within project delivery.
   

  

 Your Responsibilities
   

  

  

* Maintain and update data in Sitetracker, ensuring project dates and documentation are accurately recorded.
* Support Deployment Managers with project coordination
* Support the preparation of site layouts and use simulation tools to check how heavy-duty vehicles move within charging sites.
* Help collect and organize project documentation required for permitting and project delivery
* Coordinate internally to ensure project information and updates are properly documented
* Support the handover of completed projects to Service & Operations teams


 Your Profile
   

  

 We are looking for a Junior Project Manager who is interested in infrastructure projects and electrification and enjoys working in a structured and collaborative way. You are comfortable working with project data, documentation, and technical drawings while supporting project delivery teams.
   

  

  

* Education in engineering or a related technical field
* 2+ years of experience in project coordination, engineering support, or technical administration
* Comfortable working with project documentation, drawings, and digital tools
* Structured and detail-oriented with strong project management skills
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with different teams
* High level of proficiency in spoken and written English and Swedish.
* Interest in infrastructure, energy or e-mobility projects


 Our Offer
   

  

 Join our passionate team and be a driving force in the future of sustainable transportation. At Erinion, you won't just be a part of the change, you'll be pioneering it. We offer a competitive compensation package, alongside unparalleled professional growth opportunities. This is an early-stage company where your ideas are valued, your contributions have a significant impact, and you have the chance to develop and grow alongside Erinion.
   

  

 Further Information and Application
   

  

 We are driven by our belief that the power of diversity fuels innovation. We welcome individuals from all backgrounds, cultures, and perspectives to join our team. We are working with an ongoing selection; please apply as soon as possible if you are interested, but no later than 2026-04-07. Your application should include your CV and certificate of your highest completed degree. Please note that we cannot accept applications over email.
   

  

 If you have any further questions, please contact Sebastian Glaas, at sebastian.glaas@andpartners.se.
   

  

 A background check might be conducted for this position.
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Business System/ERP Consultant in Finance
description:
**We are looking for Business System/ERP Consultants in Finance!** 




 Do you have a degree in economics, finance, or accounting? Are you looking for a job with variety? Do you like to travel? Then you could be the right person for us!
 



  





**About Midport:** 




 Midport is a consulting house, specialized in implementing, supporting, and developing ERP and related systems for our customers, from a business point of view. We mainly work with a system from Infor called LN. Infor is the third largest business software provider in the world (www.infor.com). Our customers are in the manufacturing and service/maintenance industries, and we work with some of the leading companies in the industry. Today we have five offices in total – Stockholm, Malmö, Helsinki, Oslo, and Birmingham in the UK. We have around 70 consultants, divided into 3 core areas of logistics, finance and system development (www.midportscandinavia.com).
 



  





 We are looking for Business System/ERP Consultants in finance to add to our team in Stockholm, Sweden. The role involves close collaboration with customers and colleagues, where everyone strives to simplify and increase efficiency with applications.
 



  





 Consultants will start by participating in a training program, called Midport Academy, to get a solid education and prepare for the first project/assignment. We hope you want to be part of our success story!
 



  





**Your Profile:** 




 We believe you have graduated with a degree in Economics, Finance, Accounting or equivalent or you have equivalent work experience in the following:
 


* Good analytical skills and can structure complex problems.
* Wants to work independently and lead group work with great commitment.
* High motivation to succeed.
* Wants to be at the forefront of the latest technology.
* Fluent language skills in Swedish and English.
* Willing to travel.
* Work experience from a finance/accounting department and/or experience in ERP/business systems is a merit.



  





**Our common goal:** 



* Just like us, you will be passionate about turning complex system solutions into a business benefit for our customers.
* You will be a key player in various types of change projects.
* You will enjoy working at a high pace with the needs of the customer at the forefront.
* You will be the requested consultant who knows what the customer needs.
* You will be an accomplished consultant who is ready for the next step in your career.



  





**Our offer:** 



* A good start to your career with training and mentoring from our experienced business system consultants.
* A young and dynamic environment where you can develop your skills and contribute your ideas.
* Opportunity to work with a holistic perspective and have a broad range of responsibility.
* Some of the IT industry’s most interesting customers and projects.
* Freedom and trust.
* A strong team spirit – Our success is always the team’s success!



  





**We welcome your application!** 



* Place of employment: Stockholm, Sweden
* Last day to apply: April 15th (we process applications continuously)
* Send your application, including your CV to: job@midportscandinavia.com (Important to put ’Sweden- Finance’ in the subject line of your email application.)
* Contact person: Lyndsay Moberg, +46 738-51 70 54

title: Finance Associate - Nordics
description:
**About Antler**
 Antler is a global early-stage VC firm that partners with exceptional founders from day zero to build impactful, scalable companies.We believe exceptional companies are built by exceptional people - often before an idea, team, or company exists. Our role is to find those people early, surround them with the right co-founders, capital, and conviction, and help them build ambitious, venture-scale businesses from scratch.
   

  

 Founded in 2017, Antler now operates in 27 cities across six continents. Globally, we’ve helped create and invest in over 1,500 companies (including Lovable, Airalo and Peec AI) and supported more than 10,000 founders - with the ambition to back thousands more over the coming decade.
   

  

 In the Nordics, we are building one of the most active and hands-on early-stage investment firms in the ecosystem, backing founders from inception through to scale.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 Behind every investment decision, every fund close, and every founder we support is a finance function that makes it all work here in the Nordics. You will be a part of a two-person team running the financial infrastructure that lets us move fast, make good decisions, and keep our investors and founders confident.
   

  

 We are looking for a Finance Associate to support our finance operations across the Nordics. Working closely with the Finance Manager and local Partner group, you'll handle financial workflows across our Nordic operating companies and two funds — covering everything from day-to-day accounting to tax, legal, and regulatory compliance.
   

  

 This is not a back-office role. You'll have real ownership from day one, working directly with our Nordic Partners and plugging into Antler's global finance team on reporting, fund operations, and everything in between.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own monthly management accounts, delivering detailed variance analysis against budget
* Support on annual budgeting and forecasting, supporting strategic financial planning
* Analyse fund performance KPIs and produce quarterly NAV management accounts
* Support the Manager and General Partners with treasury, working capital, cash flow, and supplier payments
* Lead payroll, employer social costs, and corporate and VAT tax compliance across Nordic entities
* Support annual filings for operating entities, the management company, and the fund, and coordinate the annual audit process with external auditors
* Ensure timely reporting to investors, regulators, tax authorities, and other stakeholders, support global group consolidation requirements, and drive automation and process improvement initiatives
* Support group consolidation and drive automation and process improvement initiatives


**Requirements**
* At least one year of experience in finance, accounting, or business management
* Comfortable with ambiguity — you can own a task from start to finish without needing a playbook
* Detail-oriented and process-driven, with strong quantitative instincts
* Highly organised: you can keep multiple workflows moving simultaneously without dropping the ball
* A proactive communicator who's as comfortable presenting to Partners as writing a clear Slack message
* An eye for improvements, ideally you already implement AI into your workflows and are obsessed about doing things smarter
* Experience in VC, fund accounting, portfolio valuations, or legal agreements is a bonus — but not a dealbreaker


 What we offer
   

  

* Real ownership and accountability from day one and a steep learning curve working across fund operations, tax, legal, and investor relations
* Direct exposure to experienced investors, founders, and operators across the Nordic and global Antler network
* A front-row seat to the early-stage startup ecosystem
* A collaborative, high-trust team that values initiative, clear thinking, and a good sense of humor
* Flexible and international working environment, based in Stockholm


 Powered by JazzHR
   

  

 j2dnDjbCJo

title: Senior Windows Client & System Engineer
description:
Nordnet is a leading pan-Nordic digital platform for savings and investments. Ever since our start in 1996, our purpose has been to democratize savings and investments. Through passion, simplicity, and transparency, we challenge traditional ways in the financial industry, and give private savers access to the same information, tools and services as professionals. Our ambition is to inspire, encourage and enable people to take their savings to the next level, no matter who they are.
   

  

**The role in brief**
 We are looking for a Senior Windows Client & System Engineer to join our team of six. You will be responsible for maintaining a secure, high-performing technical environment for all Nordnet employees.
   

  

 In this role, you will take ownership of our client platform, ensuring it meets the stringent security and compliance standards of the financial industry. Your primary focus is the proactive lifecycle management of Windows and mobile devices using Microsoft Intune to maintain a modern, secure, and efficient digital workplace.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Windows & Mobile Management: Lead the operation, maintenance, and technical evolution of our Windows and mobile (iOS/Android) platforms.
* Build and manage advanced configuration profiles and automated deployment policies within Microsoft Intune.
* Identity & Security: Configure Conditional Access in Microsoft Entra, ensuring a deep understanding of policy logic and its impact on security.
* Patch Management: Automate the deployment of software and Windows Updates to ensure a secure and compliant environment.
* Ensure all managed devices meet the regulatory and security requirements of the financial industry.


**Your Profile**
 We are looking for a structured, solution-oriented professional with a methodical approach to technical challenges. You have a "can-do" attitude and a genuine interest in understanding system dependencies and security details.
   

  

**Qualifications And Experience**
* Several years of experience in client management within a large-scale enterprise environment.
* Windows & Intune Specialist: In-depth technical expertise in the Windows platform and extensive experience with Microsoft Intune.
* Security Mindset: Strong understanding of Conditional Access, Microsoft Entra, and identity-driven security.
* Automation Pro: Advanced skills in PowerShell for system management and lifecycle automation.
* Mobile Fleet Management: Experience securing and managing mobile devices in a professional setting.
* Language: Professional fluency in both Swedish and English, written and spoken.


**About Nordnetters**
 We value experimentation and continuous improvement. With an impartial approach, we welcome new ideas to boost our progress. Sharing knowledge and learning from our setbacks is part of the game. We have the courage to ask questions and admit that we do not have the answer, all the time. We believe that straightforward and transparent communication build trust and inclusion.
   

  

 Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We’re proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 We offer you the opportunity to work in a great team within a friendly Nordic environment with a strong focus on innovation, product development and technology. We are proud of the friendly and humble environment and commit to our goals as a team.
   

  

 We are 800 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki and Copenhagen.
   

  

 You can also visit us on: www.nordnet.se, www.nordnet.no, www.nordnet.dk and www.nordnet.fi.
   

  

**Application**
 If you have questions, please contact Head of IT-Support, Patrik Axelsson, patrik.axelsson@nordnet.se
   

  

 Apply today– we will start interviewing immediately. Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 We want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as a part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Senior Financial Controller/Business Analyst to drive change in Capital area | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Do you want to work strategically with the development of analysis and calculations of SEB’s capital adequacy measures, have a general interest in bank regulations and have a passion for driving change as part of a larger team? We are now looking for a Senior Financial Controller/Business Analyst to join the Capital & Liquidity Reporting team at Group Finance, located in Arenastaden in Stockholm.
   

  

 At SEB, we recognise that the world of finance is evolving at an extraordinary speed. That's why we're committed to driving towards a more sustainable future for everyone — people, businesses, and society. Since we welcomed our first customer in 1856, we have been a catalyst for positive change by providing reliable advice and capital to people with ideas for the future. If you are ready to make your mark on our industry and positively shape the world, you will thrive at SEB.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Group Finance aim to deliver high-quality reports, decision-making data and analyzes to our many stakeholders. You will have the opportunity to run your own initiatives and be part of the strategic work needed to achieve the Group Finance common goals. Above all, you will work with monitoring and implementation of new directives and regulations from the supervisory authorities/regulators, such as CRR, and support the implementation of new tools to make information available internally within the bank.
   

  

 The position includes ensuring that various principles for effective risk data aggregation and risk reporting are being fulfilled as well as ensuing that the banks monthly and quarterly calculation and reporting of capital adequacy ratios, COREP as well as various other capital adequacy reports are done in line with as well regulatory requirements as internally prescribed guidelines and instructions. You will provide the basis for stress tests, act as contact towards the SEB supervisory authorities and work with other relevant balance sheet analysis.
   

  

 In the Capital & Liquidity Reporting department, we have nine experts with a solid understanding of capital adequacy, balance sheet analysis and liquidity risk reporting. We work globally with our subsidiaries and branches and closely interact with other departments of the bank, such as Treasury, Risk and IT. All work is done in close collaboration with our Global Services department in Vilnius, where our production and IT development is located.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe that you are:**
 To succeed in your role with us you need to be an independent, structured, reliable and driven person, with an interest and understanding of the financial market and commitment to deadlines. You have ability to build positive relationships and a willingness to drive the bank's development work forward with a long-term perspective taken into consideration. You can understand and solve complicated financial problems in a structured way and present them easily and comprehensibly.
   

  

**You also have:**
* A degree from college or university as an engineer or within finance
* Good understanding of banks and bank regulations, such as CRR, CRD, BCBS 239 and BRRD
* Advanced skills in Excel/MS Office
* Minimum 10 year of experience working with similar questions
* Programming skills in e.g., SQL, SAS is considered as highly beneficial
* General understanding of working with Lean-Agile principles is considered as beneficial


**What We Offer**
 At SEB, we are convinced that inclusion and diversity are crucial to being able to build strong and good teams and to make our company sustainable for the future. We strive to have an inclusive and value-driven culture where we all feel valued, respected and involved regardless of background, experience, faith, gender, age or where we come from.
   

  

**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-03-31. If you have questions about the position, please contact Ola Bigestans, ola.bigestans@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 https://bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Performance Marketing Manager
description:
Do you want to help scale one of the Nordics’ most innovative hair brands internationally?
 



 BHBD is looking for a Performance Marketing Manager who wants to take ownership of our digital growth and help shape the next phase of our international expansion.
 



  





**About BHBD** 




 BHBD was born from a personal journey with alopecia and has grown into one of the Nordics’ leading brands within professional hair extensions, wigs and haircare. For us, hair is more than beauty, it’s identity, confidence and care.
 



  





 Our philosophy is simple: Gentle by Nature. Driven by Dreams.
 



  





 Today BHBD has a strong market position in Sweden, while operations in Finland, Denmark and the United States are expanding with significant potential. Our products are sold through both our own e-commerce platform and a global network of distributors. With a strong digital presence and a growing international footprint, BHBD continues to set new standards in the hair industry. BHBD is currently present in 13 export markets worldwide, working with established distributors who share our passion for quality and innovation.
 



  





 We are now strengthening the team for the next phase of growth.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 As Performance Marketing Manager, you will plan, execute and optimize BHBD’s digital marketing campaigns. Your focus will be to maximize ROI, drive customer acquisition and continuously improve our digital channels through data-driven decisions. You will play a key role in driving sales, conversion and customer growth while continuously optimizing our marketing strategies.
 



  





 You will work closely with the marketing team and have a central role in how we continue scaling BHBD internationally.
 



  





 An important part of the role will also be to develop a concept where BHBD acts as an in-house performance marketing partner for our international distributors. This includes setting up, optimizing and scaling digital advertising across multiple markets while supporting distributors with data-driven growth strategies.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Plan, launch and optimize campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok, Pinterest, Snapchat and other relevant platforms
* Drive e-commerce growth through full-funnel performance marketing, from acquisition to conversion
* Own and manage the full performance marketing setup supporting BHBD’s international distributors across multiple markets
* Plan, execute and scale campaigns that support distributor growth and brand expansion internationally
* Continuously analyze and optimize key metrics such as ROAS, CPA, CTR and conversion rates
* Run A/B tests on creatives, audiences and campaign structures to improve campaign performance
* Collaborate with our designer and social media manager to develop high-performing ad creatives
* Track, analyze and report results in Google Analytics and advertising platforms
* Manage and optimize campaign budgets to maximize performance and ensure efficient allocation of resources



  





**We are looking for someone who** 



* Has 3–5 years of experience in performance marketing
* Has strong hands-on experience with Paid Ads (Meta Ads is essential)
* Understands e-commerce and conversion funnels
* Is analytical and data-driven
* Has experience with A/B testing and conversion optimization
* Enjoys working in a fast-moving startup environment and taking ownership



  





 Bonus if you also have experience with:
 



 GA4, Klaviyo/email marketing, TikTok Ads, Pinterest Ads, or SEO.
 



  





**Personal qualities** 



* Analytical and detail-oriented
* Curious and eager to continuously learn and improve
* Solution-oriented and proactive
* Comfortable collaborating across teams, distributors and external partners
* Highly motivated to drive results



  





**Why BHBD?** 



* At BHBD you will have the opportunity to:
* Help build a global beauty brand
* Work in a fast-growing entrepreneurial company
* Have real ownership and direct impact on growth
* Be part of a team driving innovation within the hair industry



  





  





 Ready to take ownership of BHBD’s digital growth and help scale a global beauty brand?
 



 Apply directly through Easy Apply on LinkedIn or send your application to katarina.tiberg@bhbd.com.

title: Solutions Architect
description:
**TL;DR -** 
 We’re looking for a Solutions Architect to bridge product depth with business outcomes at Lovable. You’ll help customers understand how Lovable fits into their architecture, design solutions that win enterprise trust, and partner with Sales, Product, and Engineering to drive adoption of AI-native software creation.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* Experience in solutions architecture or sales engineering at a high-growth startup
* Deep understanding of technical architectures, APIs, integrations, data flows, and cloud infrastructure
* Strong consultative selling skills – able to map product capabilities to customer pain points and ROI
* Skilled at communicating complex technical concepts simply to both engineering and executive audiences
* Builder mindset – you enjoy creating scalable processes, proof-of-concepts, and reusable frameworks
* Collaborative partner to Sales, Product, and Engineering, ensuring tight feedback loops
* Bonus: experience with AI platforms, developer tools, or enterprise integrations


**What You’ll Do**
* Partner with Sales to lead technical discovery, solution design, and customer evaluation cycles
* Architect Lovable solutions that align with customer goals and technical constraints
* Develop repeatable frameworks for demos, proofs-of-value, and implementation design
* Collaborate with Product and Engineering to influence roadmap priorities and strengthen technical narratives
* Build and maintain technical enablement materials for pre-sales execution
* Serve as Lovable’s technical voice in key enterprise deals, building trust through depth and clarity


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: Backend Software Engineer (.Net Core)
description:
About Sinch
   

  


 Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses-including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others-rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 



 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 



 At Sinch we
 **"Dream Big"** 
 ,
 **"Win Together"** 
 ,
 **"Keep it simple"** 
 , and
 **"Make it Happen"** 
 . These values are our foundation!
   

  




 Description
   

  


 At Sinch, we're on a mission to empower developers and businesses to build meaningful connections. As part of our Verification team, you will be a key part in enabling customers to securely connect and identify their users, preventing fraud and powering seamless interactions on a global scale.
 



 We're looking for a
 **Backend Software Engineer** 
 who is passionate about building the resilient, high-performance cloud infrastructure that powers millions of verification transactions. Our backend systems leverage the latest
 **C# and .NET Core technologies** 
 , deployed in
 **Kubernetes on AWS** 
 . If you have a passion for problem-solving, clean code, and modern DevOps practices, you will thrive in our culture of collaboration and innovation.
 



 As a core member of our agile team, you'll take ownership of developing and maintaining high-performing backend systems while tackling complex challenges at the intersection of distributed systems, cloud-native architecture, and real-time communication. You will:
 


* **Architect & Build:** 
 Design, develop, and scale the critical C#/.NET services that form the backbone of our Verification platform.
* **Own Your Services:** 
 Take full ownership of your code, from initial design and testing, to deployment on Kubernetes in AWS and ensuring its reliability in production.
* **Elevate Our Craft:** 
 Champion best practices in software architecture, code quality, and testing, helping to continuously improve our systems and processes.
* **Master the Cloud:** 
 Leverage the full power of AWS and Kubernetes to build observable, resilient, and automated systems that can handle a global user base.
* **Collaborate & Influence:** 
 Work in a tight-knit, cross-functional team of engineers and product managers to solve complex problems and drive the technical direction of our platform.


 Requirements
   

  


 You're a product-minded engineer who sees the big picture but also loves to dive into the details. You thrive on complexity and have a passion for understanding systems from the inside out, digging deep into the codebase to solve tricky problems and master the architecture. You're motivated by a challenge and take immense pride in the quality and reliability of your work.
 


* **Your Foundation:** 
 You have significant professional experience building and running production backend systems, with deep expertise in
 **C# and .NET Core** 
 .
* **Your Mindset:** 
 You possess a strong DevOps mentality, are comfortable with CI/CD pipelines, and believe that the best code is clean, testable, and maintainable.
* **Your Approach:** 
 You are a natural collaborator with excellent communication skills, eager to share your knowledge and learn from others.


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Hands-on work with
 **Kubernetes and AWS** 
 in a production environment.
* Building and scaling distributed, service-oriented architectures.
* Databases like
 **MySQL** 
 or
 **Redis** 
 .
* Experience in mobile client development (SDK).


 Our Hiring Process
   

  


 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 



 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Lönespecialist
description:
Vi letar just nu efter en lönespecialist till vårt börsnoterade konsultbolag – en plats där vi har kul tillsammans och där ditt arbete gör skillnad på riktigt. Hos oss kombinerar du arbete med människor och system i en kultur som bygger på samarbete, gemenskap och professionalism.
   

  

**Hos oss kommer du att**
* Ansvara för den månatliga lönekörningen för alla medarbetare (månadslön, timlön, bonus, provision, förmåner, resor m.m.)
* Säkerställa korrekt rapportering till myndigheter och kollektivavtalade parter (Skatteverket, Försäkringskassan, Collectum/ITP, Fora m.fl.)
* Vara ett stöd för medarbetare och chefer i frågor som rör lön, förmåner och avtal
* Driva utveckling av lönesystemet och vara huvudkontakt för administration, behörigheter och integrationer
* Ta fram rapporter och statistik kopplat till personal och lön (t.ex. sjukfrånvaro, personalomsättning, löneutveckling)
* Leda projekt kopplat till systembyten, från kravställning och upphandling till testning och utbildning


**Vad du redan kan**
**Måsten**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av arbete som lönespecialist eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet av Hogia och/eller HRM Flex
* Goda kunskaper i Excel
* Trygg i att hantera rapportering till myndigheter och kollektivavtalade parter
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av att driva systemrelaterade projekt inom HR/lön
* Vana vid integrationer mellan HR-, tid- och ekonomisystem
* Erfarenhet av förbättringsarbete eller processutveckling inom HR/lön


**Vad vi erbjuder dig**
 Hos oss får du en kombination av trygghet och utveckling. Vi erbjuder bland annat:
   

  

* Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och flexibla arbetstider
* Möjlighet att driva förändring och påverka system- och processutveckling
* Kompetensutveckling genom utbildningar och kunskapsdelning
* Ett härligt team där vi stöttar varandra, gärna samarbetar och har kul ihop
* En arbetsplats där vi trivs tillsammans och växer både som människor och professionellt


**Om Softronic**
 Vi är ett ledande nordiskt IT-bolag som stärker våra kunders IT-förmåga i en allt mer komplex digital värld. Med bred och djup kompetens hjälper vi organisationer att skapa stabila, säkra och moderna lösningar från applikationsutveckling och integration till infrastruktur, drift och säkerhet.
   

  

 Vi tar ett helhetsansvar för IT och arbetar långsiktigt, både med våra kunder och med varandra. Hos oss är gemenskap, engagemang och utveckling en självklar del av vardagen. När vi trivs och växer tillsammans skapar vi också större värde.
   

  

**Kontakt**
 Hör gärna av dig till Anna Runermark anna.runermark@softronic.se om du har frågor. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Cyber Security Officer
company: Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency
description:
**Introduction**
 The Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency, formerly MSB, is regularly recruiting, training and deploying/mobilizing expert staff for humanitarian-, resilience- and peace-keeping operations around the world. We have extensive experience from rapidly tending to local and international crisis management needs, as well as collaborating with organisations such as the EU, UN and NATO, in areas and times of crisis, conflict and disaster.
   

  

 The Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency is opening our roster for profiles within cyber security and hybrid threats. To apply for the profile “Cyber Security Officer” you need to be a Swedish citizen.
   

  

**Introduction swedish**
 Myndigheten för civilt försvar arbetar dagligen med att förse internationella biståndsaktörer med stöd och expertis i olika insatser runt om i världen. Myndighetens engagemang inom den gemensamma säkerhets- och försvarspolitiken (GSFP) är en viktig del av Sveriges bidrag till internationell fred och säkerhet.
   

  

 Myndighetens uppdrag ökar inom cybersäkerhet och hybrida hot. Vi stödjer flera olika aktörer bland annat EU, NATO och andra bilaterala projekt med cyberrelaterade kriser. Dessa insatser syftar till att öka motståndskraften i utsatta regioner, förbättra kapaciteten för digital säkerhet och bekämpa illegala aktiviteter i cyberdomänen såsom cyberattacker, dataintrång, ransomware, informationspåverkan och digitalt organiserad brottslighet.
   

  

 Uppdrag som kan bli aktuella för dig som söker till resursbasen kan se olika ut beroende på vilken aktör som efterfrågar stöd. Exempel på olika aktörer och uppdrag:
   

  

* EU-uppdrag - verka fredsfrämjande i utsatta områden genom att öka resiliens och hantera hybridhot
* NATO-insatser - stärka cyberförsvar och öka förmågan inom cyber security incident response
* EU HRRT (Hybrid Rapid Response Teams) - ett nytt EU-verktyg för punktinsatser mot hybridhot.
* Bilaterala projekt – Kapacitetsbyggande uppdrag, tillexempel stötta ett lands myndighet inom cybersäkerhetsrelaterade områden.


 Längden på uppdragen kan variera mellan 2 veckor och 12 månader. Vid längre uppdrag ingår hemresor och semester.
   

  

 Inför utlandstjänstgöring förbereds du för internationella insatser och genomför förberedande utbildning. Under insatsperioden har du tillgång till stödfunktioner inom säkerhet och hälsa dygnet runt.
   

  

 För att söka till denna profil krävs svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

 I många fall krävs godkänd säkerhetsprövning inför specifik insats.
   

  

**Duties**
 This profile is defined at a general level; therefore, you are not required to have experience or expertise in all of the following tasks. For each specific assignment, a more detailed work description will be provided, which may include, but is not limited to, the following responsibilities:
   

  

* To support the Mission in the implementation of Mission’s cyber security controls.
* To perform or identify solutions to run vulnerability and penetration tests, identifying and defending against threats, and developing lessons learned.
* To contribute to configuration of security systems, analyze security requirements and recommend improvements.
* To monitor network traffic for suspicious behaviour, IT security metrics, SIEM alerts and security logs, systems and service performance and security posture, providing periodic status reports.
* To research, evaluate, recommend, and introduce new IT security tools, techniques, services, and technologies to improve and innovate the Mission’s IT security solutions portfolio.
* To support and participate in the Mission’s Cybersecurity Incident Response Team and work closely with stakeholders involved with Cybersecurity issues.
* To be able to conduct regular technical IT security risk and control assessments/audits of systems and infrastructure, and provide actionable measures for remediation.
* To identify budgetary requirements, prepare requests for procurement proposals, draft technical specifications, and perform subsequent technical evaluation of received bids


 and commercial proposals in relation to IT Security products, solutions, and services.
   

  

* To prepare and provide training, advice and easy to follow user guidelines on using and maintaining IT and cyber security aspects.
* To identify and report on lessons learned and best practices within the respective area of responsibility.
* To contribute and ensure timely reporting on activities within the respective area of responsibility.
* To take account of gender equality and human rights aspects in the execution of task


**Qualifications**
**Experience**
 At least 4 years of relevant professional experience.
   

  

* Knowledge of industry best practices in network, application, hardware and OS platform security and global security standards.
* Problem solving skills and the ability to understand and analyze complex technical end users’ problems and requests, and successfully manage and solve them daily.


 Desirable skills
   

  

* Ability to develop awareness campaigns.
* Ability to advise on security and counter intelligence.
* Familiarity with a cybersecurity framework like NIST, ISO 27001


**Education**
 University Degree in a relevant field, or equivalent and attested police and/or military education.
   

  

 It is considered an asset if having obtained one or more field related certification such
   

  

 as: GIAC, CISSP, CEH, ISC2, CompTIA Security+, CISA, CISM
   

  

**Languages**
 Proficiency in both spoken and written Swedish and English at an advanced level is required.
   

  

**Other Requirements**
 Vi söker personer med starkt samhällsengagemang. För oss är det viktigt att du förstår, respekterar och agerar utifrån Myndigheten för civilt försvars mandat och uppförandekod.
   

  

 Innan registrering i resursbasen behöver du fylla i en självskattad hälsodeklaration. Om du sedan rekryteras till en internationell insats krävs att en hälsoundersökning genomförs och att resultaten godkänns av Myndigheten för civilt försvar innan anställning. Vissa sjukdomar och tillstånd kan utgöra hinder för utlandstjänstgöring. Om du har frågor kring hälsokraven, vänligen kontakta Myndighetens medicinska koordinatorer, medical.coordinator@mcf.se
   

  

 Har du en ordinarie arbetsgivare så bör du informera denne om ditt eventuella engagemang med Myndigheten för civilt försvar.
   

  

 Myndighetens verksamhet utgår från den drabbade befolkningens behov och alla människors lika värde. Som anställd på Myndigheten för civilt försvar åtar du dig att inom ditt arbetsområde och genom ditt uppträdande aktivt verka för att förebygga diskriminering och trakasserier på grund av kön, etniskt ursprung, ålder, religion eller annan trosuppfattning, politisk åskådning, funktionsnedsättning, sexuell läggning, könsöverskridande identitet eller uttryck.
   

  

**Profile**
 Vi söker dig som kan:
   

  

* Interagera omdömesfullt och visa respekt för mångfald och kön i multikulturella miljöer.
* Utföra ditt arbete under svåra och krävande förhållanden men ändå med god förmåga till flexibilitet.
* Etablera och upprätthålla effektiva och goda arbetsförhållanden med kollegor, chefer och externa samarbetspartners.
* Kommunicera tydligt i såväl tal som skrift.
* Ta initiativ till att lösa uppgifter och problem både på ett praktiskt och analytiskt plan.


**Contractual conditions**
 Myndigheten för civilt försvar har en jämställdhets- och likabehandlingspolicy för att undvika all form av diskriminering. Vi strävar efter en jämn könsbalans i vår resursbas och på våra insatser.
   

  

 Vår resursbas innehåller en variation av yrken och kompetenser. En registrering i resursbasen gäller i 3 år. Du är under perioden själv ansvarig för att alltid ha aktuella uppgifter upplagda i vårt personalhanteringssystem, MyPages. Efter 3 år görs en utvärdering och du kan bli erbjuden en förlängd registrering. Det är obligatoriskt att delta på Myndigheten för civilt försvars introduktionskurs innan insats. Introduktionskursen pågår i en vecka och vi håller denna några gånger per år. Under kursen erhålls en mindre lön.
   

  

 Att vara insatspersonal hos oss är en möjlighet till kompetensutveckling parallellt med ditt ordinarie arbete, och du kan komma att erbjudas utbildningar inom ditt kompetensområde. Att vara insatspersonal är en möjlighet att bidra till det svenska biståndsarbetet internationellt.
   

  

 Att jobba med Myndigheten för civilt försvar på internationella insatser betyder att registrerade individer i resursbasen är tillfälligt anställda av myndigheten. Vi betalar lön och övrigt förmånspaket beroende på insats till personalen, inklusive fri hemresa och tillgång tillstödfunktioner inom hälsa och säkerhet dygnet runt när du är på insats.
   

  

 Hur du ansöker:
   

  

 För att söka till Myndigheten för civilts försvars resursbas var vänlig skapa ett konto på MyPages. Notera att informationen som du delar på MyPages blir till ditt CV. När du skapat ditt konto och registrerat din CV-information skickar du in din ansökan genom att klicka på ”Apply” i den aktuella annonsen på www.mcf.se och följ de anvisade stegen. Har du redan ett konto på MyPages kan du gå direkt till Apply i annonsen på www.mcf.se. Har du problem med MyPages kan du kontakta supporten genom att maila mypages@mcf.se
   

  

 Det är ditt ansvar som sökande att dokumentera din kompetens på ett sätt som medger en saklig, kvalitativ bedömning.
   

  

 Som statlig myndighet omfattas vi av offentlighetsprincipen. Det innebär att om någon begär att få kopior på till exempel ansökningshandlingar är vi skyldiga att lämna ut dem. Om du har skyddad identitet ska du kontakta HR-handläggaren som anges nedan, innan du registrerar några uppgifter på MyPages.
   

  

 Observera att din ansökan måste vara på engelska.
   

  

 Vi kommer att hantera ansökningarna löpande under ansökningstiden vilket innebär att vi önskar att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Application deadline**
 2026-03-30
   

  

**Point of contact**
 Anna Saxén
   

  

 anna.saxen@mcf.se
   

  

 +46102405147

title: SAP Procurement Lead
description:
**Role:** 
 SAP Procurement Lead
 



**Experience (Years):** 
 10–15 years
 



  





**Tata consultancy Services** 
 is an IT services, consulting and business solutions organization that has been partnering with many of the world’s largest businesses for the past 50 years. We believe innovation and collective knowledge can transform all our futures with greater purpose. We help companies across industries achieve their strategic goals and lead their digital transformation programs. With 600,000 experts globally and 18,000+ consultants working for leading Nordic Customers, we have a strong sense of purpose for the ecosystem around us – our employees, partners, customers and society.
 



  





**Job Requirements:** 




  




* **Experience:** 
 Generally, 5–15+ years in SAP consulting or functional roles, with extensive experience in S/4HANA sourcing and procurement.
* **Technical Skills:** 
 Deep knowledge of SAP MM, Ariba, and/or SAP Fieldglass.
* **Leadership:** 
 Experience leading large-scale, global implementation teams.
* **Functional Expertise:** 
 Strong understanding of purchasing, inventory management, and supplier collaboration.
* SAP Certification in S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement.



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* **Solution Design & Strategy:** 
 Lead end-to-end SAP procurement implementations, ensuring adherence to Best Practices and Clean Core principles.
* **System Configuration:** 
 Configure and optimize SAP MM, Ariba (Upstream/Downstream), or Fieldglass modules to meet business requirements.
* **Stakeholder Management:** 
 Collaborate with business, procurement, and IT teams to translate requirements into technical specifications.
* **Integration & Support:** 
 Oversee integration with SAP Finance (FI/CO) and third-party tools, providing troubleshooting and high-level support.
* **Process Improvement:** 
 Drive automation, data accuracy, and procurement transformation projects to maximize value.



  





**Does that sound interesting?** 




  





 You are welcome to submit your application consisting of your CV, personal letter, relevant degrees or certifications details, professional references, etc. We work with ongoing recruitment so send in your application as soon as possible.
 



  





 We look forward to receiving your application via LinkedIn or mail to
 **aswini.ranganathan@tcs.com**
